local_overrides: Current validation surface is build-only; lint, test, and typecheck scripts are not yet present.
Repo-specific command inventory centers on Vite multi-page frontend commands and backend proxy assumptions.
Repo-local skills are still planned rather than implemented, which is acceptable for this frontend repo at the standardized stage.
notes: UserDashboard is a lightweight frontend codexified from the single-repo@1.2.0 template line using the local CodexEnv checkout as its template source.
